name: Satays
recipeIngredient: -or lean pork or beef, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread the meat onto 12-inch bamboo skewers, placing several strips on each skewer.
2. In a bowl, combine minced garlic, onion, cilantro, brown sugar, lime juice, nampla, and vegetable oil.
3. Pour the marinade over the skewers and marinate for at least one hour.
4. Heat barbecue coals until hot or preheat a broiler.
5. Place the skewers on the grill or broiler rack and cook until done as desired.
6. Serve the satays with peanut butter sauce.
Makes 10-12 skewers.
